sub_modules.unsharp_window3x3: Passes the current 3x3 zero-padded neighborhood into the stencil datapath.
sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Computes a fixed 3x3 Gaussian blur with coefficients 1 2 1 / 2 4 2 / 1 2 1 and normalization by 16.
sub_modules.unsharp_subtract: Computes the signed high-frequency residual as original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.unsharp_gain_scale: Multiplies the signed residual by the runtime gain factor.
sub_modules.unsharp_reconstruct: Adds the scaled residual back to the original pixel.
sub_modules.unsharp_saturate: Clamps the reconstructed signed value to the output pixel range.
